textPlain: Mildly related: my favorite tool for viewing .git diffs diff2html - a CLI that with one command opens the diff in your browserhttps://diff2html.xyz/ -- https://github.com/rtfpessoa/diff2html
Apart from source code versioning what are the other most important real world use cases of diff algorithms ?
- Backup and restore- integrity checks from security perspective- nlp, finding same tokens in textEtc
